name: Drift
tagline: AI-powered conversational marketing and sales platform
description: Drift pioneered conversational marketing with AI chatbots, raised $107M and was valued at $1B by Vista Equity. Acquired by Salesloft in 2024, the brand and product are being phased out.
story: Drift was founded in 2015 and essentially created the 'conversational marketing' category — AI chatbots that engaged website visitors, qualified leads, and booked meetings in real time. The company raised $107 million from General Catalyst, Sequoia Capital, and Founder Collective. In 2021, Vista Equity Partners acquired a majority stake at a $1 billion valuation. But growth stalled under Vista's ownership. In February 2024, Salesloft acquired Drift. The Drift brand is being systematically phased out — new customers buy Salesloft packages, customer support features have been deprioritized, and the general-purpose automation capabilities are being dismantled. For the teams that built their marketing stack around Drift as a standalone product, the acquisition was effectively a product kill.
